text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No matter the race, our aim is always to win, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But in reality... Victory alone is not enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is my familial duty to not just win, but win in an
elegant and magnificent fashion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, even at the Tenno Sho, I plan to show
the crowd exactly how a Mejiro runs.
